UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WM PROPERTIES, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CABANA HOME MILL VALLEY, LLC THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3024 FILLMORE STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94123, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, **APPLIES TO ALL UNNAMED/UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS.**

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WM PROPERTIES, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CABANA HOME MILL VALLEY, LLC DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
